children.heading: Eligible Federal PLUS Loan
children.label: 1 Eligible Federal PLUS Loan
children.text: The term “eligible Federal PLUS Loan” means a loan described in made to a parent of a dependent student who is a new borrower on or after .section 1078–2 of this titleJuly 1, 2009

children.heading: Eligible lender
children.label: 2 Eligible lender
children.text: The term “eligible lender” has the meaning given the term in .section 1085 of this title

children.heading: Planning and implementation
children.label: 1 Planning and implementation
children.text: During the period beginning on , and ending on , the Secretary shall plan and implement the pilot program under this subsection. During the planning and implementation, the Secretary shall consult with other Federal agencies with knowledge of, and experience with, auction programs, including the Federal Communication Commission and the Department of the Treasury.September 27, 2007June 30, 2009

children.heading: Origination and disbursement; applicability of section 1078–2
children.label: 2 Origination and disbursement; applicability of section 1078–2
children.text: Beginning on , the Secretary shall arrange for the origination and disbursement of all eligible Federal PLUS Loans in accordance with the provisions of this subsection and the provisions of that are not inconsistent with this subsection.July 1, 2009section 1078–2 of this title

children.heading: Auction for each State
children.label: A Auction for each State
children.text: The Secretary administers an auction under this paragraph for each State, under which eligible lenders compete to originate eligible Federal PLUS Loans under this paragraph at all institutions of higher education within such State.

children.label: i
children.text: a set of borrower benefits and servicing requirements each eligible lender shall meet in order to participate in such an auction;

children.label: ii
children.text: an assessment of each such eligible lender’s capacity, including capital capacity, to participate effectively; and

children.label: iii
children.text: a commitment from such eligible lender that, if the lender has a winning bid under subparagraph (F), the lender will enter into the agreement required under subparagraph (G).

children.heading: Timing and origination
children.label: C Timing and origination
children.text: Each State auction takes place every 2 years, and the eligible lenders with the winning bids for the State are the only eligible lenders permitted to originate eligible Federal PLUS Loans made under this paragraph for the cohort of students at the institutions of higher education within the State until the students graduate from or leave the institutions of higher education.

children.heading: Bids
children.label: D Bids
children.text: Each eligible lender’s bid consists of the amount of the special allowance payment (after the application of ) the eligible lender proposes to accept from the Secretary with respect to the eligible Federal PLUS Loans made under this paragraph in lieu of the amount determined under .section 1087–1(b)(2)(I)(v) of this titlesection 1087–1(b)(2)(I) of this title

children.heading: Maximum bid
children.label: E Maximum bid
children.text: The maximum bid allowable under this paragraph shall not exceed the amount of the special allowance payable on eligible Federal PLUS Loans made under this paragraph computed under (other than clauses (ii), (iii), (iv), and (vi) of such section), except that for purposes of the computation under this subparagraph, shall be applied by substituting “1.79 percent” for “2.34 percent”.section 1087–1(b)(2)(I) of this titlesection 1087–1(b)(2)(I)(i)(III) of this title

children.heading: Winning bids
children.label: F Winning bids
children.text: The winning bids for each State auction shall be the 2 bids containing the lowest and the second lowest proposed special allowance payments, subject to subparagraph (E).

children.label: aa
children.text: seeks an eligible Federal PLUS Loan under this paragraph to enable a dependent student to attend an institution of higher education within the State;

children.label: bb
children.text: is eligible for an eligible Federal PLUS Loan; and

children.label: cc
children.text: elects to borrow from the eligible lender; and

children.label: II
children.text: agrees to accept a special allowance payment (after the application of ) from the Secretary with respect to the eligible Federal PLUS Loans originated under subclause (I) in the amount proposed in the second lowest winning bid described in subparagraph (F) for the applicable State auction.section 1087–1(b)(2)(I)(v) of this title

children.label: aa
children.text: reducing the amount of any payments otherwise due to such eligible lender from the Secretary by the amount of the penalty; or

children.label: bb
children.text: requesting any other Federal agency to reduce the amount of any payments due to such eligible lender from such agency by the amount of the penalty, in accordance with .section 3716 of title 31

children.label: II
children.text: A prohibition of bidding by such lender in other auctions under this section.

children.label: III
children.text: The limitation, suspension, or termination of such eligible lender’s participation in the loan program under part B.

children.label: IV
children.text: Any other enforcement action the Secretary is authorized to take under part B.

children.heading: Sealed bids; confidentiality
children.label: H Sealed bids; confidentiality
children.text: All bids are sealed and the Secretary keeps the bids confidential, including following the announcement of the winning bids.

children.heading: Eligible lender of last resort
children.label: I Eligible lender of last resort

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: In the event that there is no winning bid under subparagraph (F), the students at the institutions of higher education within the State that was the subject of the auction shall be served by an eligible lender of last resort, as determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: Determination of eligible lender of last resort
children.label: ii Determination of eligible lender of last resort
children.text: Prior to the start of any auction under this paragraph, eligible lenders that desire to serve as an eligible lender of last resort shall submit an application to the Secretary at such time and in such manner as the Secretary may determine. Such application shall include an assurance that the eligible lender will meet the prequalification requirements described in subparagraph (B).

children.heading: Geographic location
children.label: iii Geographic location
children.text: The Secretary shall identify an eligible lender of last resort for each State.

children.heading: Notification timing
children.label: iv Notification timing
children.text: The Secretary shall not identify any eligible lender of last resort until after the announcement of all the winning bids for a State auction for any year.

children.heading: Maximum special allowance
children.label: v Maximum special allowance
children.text: The Secretary is authorized to set a special allowance payment that shall be payable to a lender of last resort for a State under this subparagraph, which special allowance payment shall be kept confidential, including following the announcement of winning bids. The Secretary shall set such special allowance payment so that it incurs the lowest possible cost to the Federal Government, taking into consideration the lowest bid that was submitted in an auction for such State and the lowest bid submitted in a similar State, as determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: Guarantee against losses
children.label: J Guarantee against losses
children.text: Each eligible Federal PLUS Loan originated under this paragraph shall be insured by a guaranty agency in accordance with part B, except that, notwithstanding , such insurance shall be in an amount equal to 99 percent of the unpaid principal and interest due on the loan.section 1078(b)(1)(G) of this title

children.heading: Loan fees
children.label: K Loan fees
children.text: The Secretary shall not collect a loan fee under with respect to an eligible Federal Plus Loan originated under this paragraph.section 1087–1(d) of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: An eligible lender who is permitted to originate eligible Federal PLUS Loans for a borrower under this paragraph shall have the option to consolidate such loans into 1 loan.

children.heading: Notification
children.label: ii Notification
children.text: In the event a borrower with eligible Federal PLUS Loans made under this paragraph wishes to consolidate the loans, the borrower shall notify the eligible lender who originated the loans under this paragraph.

children.heading: Limitation on eligible lender option to consolidate
children.label: iii Limitation on eligible lender option to consolidate
I
children.text: the borrower includes in the notification in clause (ii) verification of consolidation terms and conditions offered by an eligible lender other than the eligible lender described in clause (i); and

children.label: II
children.text: not later than 10 days after receiving such notification from the borrower, the eligible lender described in clause (i) does not agree to match such terms and conditions, or provide more favorable terms and conditions to such borrower than the offered terms and conditions described in subclause (I).

children.label: I
children.text: in the case of a Federal Direct PLUS Loan, the eligible lender agrees, not later than 10 days after the borrower requests such consolidation from the lender, to match the consolidation terms and conditions that would otherwise be available to the borrower if the borrower consolidated such loans in the loan program under part D; or

children.label: II
children.text: in the case of a loan made on behalf of a dependent student under , the eligible lender agrees, not later than 10 days after the borrower requests such consolidation from the lender, to match the consolidation terms and conditions offered by an eligible lender other than the eligible lender that originated the borrower’s loans under this paragraph.section 1078–2 of this title

children.heading: Special allowance on consolidation loans that include loans made under this paragraph
children.label: v Special allowance on consolidation loans that include loans made under this paragraph
I
children.text: the weighted average of the special allowance payment on such loans, except that in calculating such weighted average the Secretary shall exclude any Federal Direct PLUS Loan included in the consolidation; or

children.label: aa
children.text: the average of the bond equivalent rates of the quotes of the 3-month commercial paper (financial) rates in effect for each of the days in such quarter as reported by the Federal Reserve in Publication H–15 (or its successor) for such 3-month period; plus

children.label: bb
children.text: 1.59 percent.

children.heading: Interest payment rebate fee
children.label: vi Interest payment rebate fee
children.text: Any loan under consolidated under this paragraph shall not be subject to the interest payment rebate fee under .section 1078–3 of this titlesection 1078–3(f) of this title

the extent of the savings to the Federal Government that are generated through the pilot program, compared to the cost the Federal Government would have incurred in operating the PLUS loan program under in the absence of the pilot program;section 1078–2 of this title
the number of lenders that participated in the pilot program, and the extent to which the pilot program generated competition among lenders to participate in the auctions under the pilot program;
the number and volume of loans made under the pilot program in each State;

children.label: A
children.text: lenders participating in the pilot program to originate loans made through the pilot program smoothly and efficiently;

children.label: B
children.text: institutions of higher education participating in the pilot program to disburse loans made through the pilot program smoothly and efficiently; and

children.label: C
children.text: parents to obtain loans made through the pilot program in a timely and efficient manner;
the differential impact, if any, of the auction among the States, including between rural and non-rural States; and
the feasibility of using the mechanism piloted to operate the other loan programs under part B of this subchapter.

children.label: A
children.text: not later than , a preliminary report regarding the findings of the evaluation described in subsection (c);September 1, 2010

children.label: B
children.text: not later than , an interim report regarding such findings; andSeptember 1, 2012

children.label: C
children.text: not later than , a final report regarding such findings.September 1, 2013

children.label: A
children.text: improving the operation and administration of the auction; and

children.label: B
children.text: improving the operation and administration of other loan programs under part B.
